summary: Iteration 63 - Payment Timeline, Sales Intelligence Engine, and Performance Dashboards testing complete. All backend APIs (13/13 tests passed) and frontend components working correctly.

endpoints: GET /api/payment-timeline/steps - Returns 5 steps (issued, proof_submitted, verification, confirmed, fulfilled)
GET /api/payment-timeline/invoice/:id - Returns events and sequence for invoice
GET /api/sales-intelligence/leaderboard - Returns staff with efficiency scores
GET /api/staff-performance/supervisor-overview - Returns team metrics with at-risk/overloaded staff

features: Summary cards (Team Avg Efficiency, Active Sales Staff, Total Open Opportunities, Total Wins)
Close rate, speed score, rating score, workload metrics
Team Size, Avg Efficiency, At Risk count, Overloaded count

seed_data_creation: Created test invoice INV-20260321-9C8055 for demo.customer@konekt.com to test Payment Timeline
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment Timeline, Sales Intelligence, and Performance Dashboards fully functional. Routes: /staff/performance (Staff Performance Dashboard), /admin/supervisor-performance (Supervisor Performance Dashboard), /dashboard/invoices/:id/pay (Invoice Payment with Timeline). Efficiency scoring formula: close_rate*0.4 + response_speed*0.3 + customer_rating*0.3. All 3 staff members currently show as 'at-risk' (efficiency < 50) because they have no closed opportunities yet.
